summary: Comprehensive testing of Kwerky Media 5-page website. All features working correctly - navigation, pages, contact form, and responsive design.
seed_data_creation: Test contact form submissions created during testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 5 pages tested and working: Home, Services, About, Blogs, Videos. Contact form only on Services page (correct). Navigation between all pages works. Mobile responsive menu works. Backend API /api/contact endpoint working correctly.

navigation.details: All 5 nav links (Home, Services, About Us, Blogs, Videos) + CTA button working

homepage.details: Hero, Value, Services preview, Proof/testimonials, Final CTA sections all present

services_page.details: 5 detailed service cards + contact form working with successful submission

contact_form.details: POST /api/contact working, form submits successfully with toast notification

about_page.details: Founders section with Shashikanth Peetla and Mithun Mohan images loading correctly

blogs_page.details: 2 blog cards (Blockchain, Data Center) displaying correctly

videos_page.details: YouTube and Instagram links present and correct

footer.details: Footer with contact info and social links (YouTube, LinkedIn, Instagram, Twitter) on all pages

contact_form_placement.details: Contact form ONLY on Services page - not on Home, About, Blogs, or Videos

logo_visibility.details: Logo visible in nav bar on all pages

cta_text.details: CTA text 'Let's discuss your project' consistent everywhere

mobile_responsive.details: Mobile menu toggle works, all content responsive
